title: Thrixspermum hainanense
taxonomy: Thrixspermum hainanense is classified within the family Orchidaceae, specifically within the subfamily Epidendroideae. Further classification places it within the tribe Vandeae and the subtribe Angraecinae. This species is part of the genus Thrixspermum, which is native to tropical Asia. The genus Thrixspermum is closely related to the genus Gastrochilus. Thrixspermum hainanense is an epiphytic orchid found in the wild.
